info.title: Logtailr API
info.description: REST API for the Logtailr concurrent multi-source log aggregator. Provides health monitoring, source status, configuration inspection, Prometheus metrics, real-time log streaming via WebSocket, and full CRUD management of sources, outputs, alert rules, alert events, saved searches, and settings.

get.description: Returns the aggregate health status of all log sources, with counts by status category.
Returns detailed health information for every registered log source.
Returns detailed health information for a specific log source.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Source name as defined in the config

get.description: Returns the active configuration with secrets redacted (passwords replaced with '***', webhook URLs hidden).
Returns all metrics in Prometheus text exposition format.
Returns recent alert events fired by the alert engine from memory, including rule name, severity, message, and timestamp.
Returns all configured alert rules with their fire count and last fired timestamp from the running engine.
Upgrades to a WebSocket connection that streams log lines in real-time as JSON objects. Supports optional query parameter filters for level and source.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Minimum log level filter. Only logs at this level or above are sent.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by source name. Only logs from this source are sent.

101.description: WebSocket upgrade successful. Each message is a JSON-encoded LogLine.

get.description: Returns all configured log sources from the database.

post.description: Creates a new log source in the database.

get.description: Returns all configured output destinations from the database.
Returns all alert rules stored in the database.

get.summary: Get an alert rule by ID

get.description: Returns persisted alert events from the database with optional filters and pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 100, max 1000)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of events to skip for pagination

post.description: Marks an alert event as acknowledged. Idempotent — re-acknowledging an already acknowledged event is a no-op.

get.description: Returns all saved search definitions from the database.

get.summary: Get a saved search by ID

get.description: Returns the value of a specific setting by key.

put.description: Creates or updates a setting. Uses upsert semantics.

value.description: The setting value (any valid JSON type)

status.description: Aggregate status: healthy (all sources OK), degraded (some degraded), unhealthy (any failed)

uptime.description: Server uptime in Go duration format (e.g. '2h30m15s')

LogLine.description: A parsed log line, sent via WebSocket as JSON

tags.name: Alerts
tags.description: In-memory alert engine events and rules

tags.name: Sources
tags.description: CRUD operations for log sources (requires database)

tags.name: Outputs
tags.description: CRUD operations for output destinations (requires database)

tags.name: Alert Rules
tags.description: CRUD operations for alert rules (requires database)

tags.name: Alert Events
tags.description: Persisted alert events with filtering and acknowledgement (requires database)

tags.name: Saved Searches
tags.description: CRUD operations for saved search definitions (requires database)
